sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT, active BOOLEAN, group_id INT);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, active, group_id) VALUES (1, TRUE, 1), (2, TRUE, 1), (3, FALSE, 2);
UPDATE test_table SET active = FALSE WHERE id = 1;
SELECT group_id, bool_and(active) AS all_active FROM test_table GROUP BY group_id;
DELETE FROM test_table WHERE bool_and(active) = FALSE;
